reviews.comment:
Esta vieja, esta en un estratégico.  Pero lo surtidores no se ven los displey. Los baños esta limpio con jabón y papel. Es una lastima como socio del ACA

(Translated by Google)
This old station is in a strategic location. But the pump displays aren't visible. The restrooms are clean with soap and toilet paper. It's a shame as an ACA member.
